title: Secret of the Ancient City: Echo Dimension
description: The mod adds a spooky Echo Dimension, custom structures, powerful echo-based tools and armor, unique functional blocks, dangerous natural spawns, and a major boss fight against the Echo Warden Monarch.
body:
Welcome to the Echo Dimension! 

Secret of the Ancient City: Echo Dimension mod expands Minecraft with a new dark dimension, powerful echo-themed tools and armor, ancient structures, functional blocks, dangerous exploration, and a major boss fight against the Echo Warden Monarch. It is designed to feel connected to vanilla Minecraft while adding a deeper endgame progression path.

Players begin by exploring the Deep Dark and Ancient Cities, discovering echo materials, crafting special items, activating an ancient portal, and entering the mysterious Echo Dimension. Inside this dimension, they will find strange terrain, rare resources, hidden structures, dangerous encounters, and the path toward the final boss.

Main Features
Echo Dimension
The Echo Dimension is a dark and mysterious world filled with sculk-like energy, ancient ruins, echo resources, and dangerous secrets. It expands the feeling of the Deep Dark into a full dimension with its own atmosphere and progression.

Players can explore this dimension to find rare blocks, special materials, structures, loot, and the boss arena.

Echo Warden Monarch
The Echo Warden Monarch is the main boss of the mod. Inspired by the Warden, this creature is stronger, more dangerous, and designed as a true endgame challenge.

The boss fight takes place in a large arena and requires preparation, strong equipment, and careful strategy. Defeating the Echo Warden Monarch rewards the player with important endgame materials used for advanced crafting.

Items and Tools
The mod adds several new echo-themed items, including:

Echo Key — Used to activate the portal to the Echo Dimension.

Echo Core — A powerful endgame material obtained through late-game progression or boss rewards.

Echo Crystal — A special crystal filled with echo energy, used for crafting and redstone-related mechanics.

Sculk Binder Eye — A mysterious item connected to sculk and echo energy.

Echo Book — An in-game guide that explains the mod’s items, blocks, tools, portal system, dimension, boss, and warnings.

The mod also adds a full set of echo tools, including an Echo Sword, Echo Pickaxe, Echo Axe, Echo Shovel, and Echo Hoe, each with unique utility or combat-related abilities.

Blocks
Echoes of the Void includes several new blocks for progression, utility, decoration, and world interaction:

Echo Ore — A rare ore used to obtain echo materials.

Echo Altar — A powerful ancient block connected to echo progression and special mechanics.

Echo Protector Block — A defensive block that can help protect an area from hostile dark-spawn mobs.

Void Glass — A dark green-blue translucent glass block with high resistance and an echo-themed appearance.

Echoenergy Stone — A mysterious stone infused with echo power.

Dormant Echo Blocks — Ancient echo blocks used in progression, structures, and crafting.

Progression
The progression of the mod is built around exploration and discovery:

Explore the Deep Dark and Ancient Cities.
Collect echo-related materials.
Craft or obtain the Echo Key.
Activate the ancient portal.
Enter the Echo Dimension.
Enter the boss arena.
Defeat the Echo Warden Monarch.
Unlock advanced echo crafting, tools, armor, and blocks.
Short Summary
SotAC: Echo Dimension expands Minecraft’s Deep Dark with a new Echo Dimension, powerful echo tools, mysterious blocks, ancient structures, and a dangerous boss called the Echo Warden Monarch. Explore dark ruins, activate an ancient portal, collect echo materials, and survive a high-stakes endgame fight.

PS: Don't open the chest!
